hero.title: Car Pool
hero.description: A private planning workspace for ride offers, local trip joins, passenger requests, and weekly carpool activity without live matching, payments, or external messaging.
points: Join or leave saved trips locally

flow.title: Rides → My Trips → Requests → Insights
steps: Create ride offers with route, seats, and schedule details
Join or leave saved trips in the local workspace
Review pending, approved, and rejected requests
Track seats, completed trips, cancellations, and weekly activity

differences.title: Carpool coordination without marketplace assumptions
differences.description: Car Pool helps users organize ride-sharing intent and local decisions while keeping real-world verification outside the product boundary.

items.title: Offer
items.description: Save route, departure, meeting point, vehicle, seat, price-reference, and status details.

items.title: Trip
items.description: Track joined trips and leave actions locally without dispatching, navigation, or payments.

items.title: Review
items.description: Organize requests by pending, approved, and rejected status before confirming outside the app.

feel.title: A calm place to organize shared rides
feel.description: The workflow is designed for users who already know or are evaluating a shared ride and need structure before acting in the real world.

items.title: Direct
items.description: The first screen opens to ride records and next actions.

items.title: Practical
items.description: Seats, requests, trip status, and weekly activity are visible without complex marketplace features.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No live matching, payments, driver verification, route tracking, chat, or safety guarantees are included.

audiences.title: Who uses Car Pool
audiences.description: Car Pool supports households, commuters, students, and small groups organizing shared ride information.

items.title: Commuters
items.description: Track repeated routes, seats, and meeting points for planned rides.

items.title: Families and groups
items.description: Coordinate local trip participation and request status in one protected workspace.

items.title: Occasional travelers
items.description: Record one-time shared rides, pickup notes, and cancellation context.

resourceSection.title: Car Pool essentials
resourceSection.description: The app is a local coordination and recordkeeping workflow, not a transportation marketplace.

items.title: Ride records
items.description: Route, departure, seat, vehicle, driver, meeting point, price-reference, and status details.

items.title: Trip records
items.description: Joined passengers, seats, local leave actions, and trip state.

items.title: Request records
items.description: Passenger request details, pickup notes, pending/approved/rejected status, and response notes.

groupedSection.title: A simple carpool workflow
groupedSection.description: Each section supports a specific coordination job without expanding into live rideshare operations.

items.name: Rides
items.description: Create, edit, duplicate, filter, paginate, and delete ride records.

items.name: My Trips
items.description: Review upcoming and past joined trips with local join and leave actions.

items.name: Requests
items.description: Create and review pending, approved, and rejected passenger requests.

items.name: Insights
items.description: See ride count, seats offered, seats filled, completed trips, cancellation rate, and weekly activity.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Car Pool follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, generated API types, and shared shell navigation.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in isolated tables.

finalCta.title: Open Car Pool
finalCta.description: Start with rides, then manage trips, requests, and activity insights.
